content:
* Your logic-powered common sense

If this sounds insane: it is. But it’s also real.
I’ll show you next week.

—A

* * *

📱 3. FOLLOW-UP TEXT MESSAGE (Tone-blend: human, funny, clear)
--------------------------------------------------------------

> lmao valid—i knew that message was a chaos sandwich lol
>
> okay let me rephrase:
> i’m building a thing that reads, breaks apart, and remixes texts—from scripture to sci-fi to reddit posts. it might look like AI but it’s deeper than that—it’s trying to build structure out of language itself. like if myths had a codebase.
>
> i don’t need you to understand all of it—I need you to help me see what makes _sense_. logic-wise. flow-wise.
>
> i’ll show you next week—your odds brain will be very appreciated lol
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 30 (chunk 30/206)
